sections.title: Talking to a priest at the temple

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: Greetings. May the blessings of Icthlarin rest on your tired shoulders and set you at ease during these strange times.

sections.title: Talking to a priest at a gate
Talking to the priest outside the south-eastern gate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that place to the south?

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: That's the old necropolis. It's been abandoned for a long time. In fact, you couldn't even access most of it until fairly recently.

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: It was mostly buried under the sand until a storm came in from the south.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... I bet the place is a hotspot for grave robbers.

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: Not as many as you'd think. There's a lot of superstition about the place. People say that even the sand is marked by death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You sound like you don't believe them.

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: Not really. The sand is probably that colour due to the amount of salt in it. Still, if it keeps people from robbing the dead, that's no bad thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: Hey, hey, hey! What in the name of sweet suffering Icthlarin are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought this acne potion might clear up your spots.

lines.speaker: Priest
lines.text: All that you'll achieve by pouring that potion on me is to ruin my lovely robes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I was just trying to help.
